_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 79% bottom analog and Fear & Greed at 28 with DXY weakness support an eventual move up to Disbelief, but with 0% directional accuracy in this regime and no confirmed breaker, HOLD is the skilled call until stablecoin growth or BTC momentum validates the transition.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both see recovery potential but analyst hedges with HOLD while Narrative leans bullish; analyst's on-chain divergences temper the Narrative's enthusiasm
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth breaks above 45 with btc_momentum_30d clearing 60 on sustained ETF inflows
next_move.invalidated_if: funding spikes above 65 with VIX breaking 70 and BTC 30d momentum dropping below 40 — would signal Denial→Panic leg down
